patterns.regex:
-----BEGIN NATS USER JWT-----\s*
([A-Za-z0-9_-]+={0,2})\s*
-----END NATS USER JWT-----
patterns.description: NATS user JWT token

patterns.regex:
-----BEGIN NATS USER NKEY SEED-----\s*
(SU[A-Za-z0-9]{58})\s*
-----END NATS USER NKEY SEED-----
patterns.description: NATS user NKEY seed (starts with SU)
